page_content:
Formerly: EDCI695.

TLPL605 Social, Cultural & Ethical Dimensions of Teaching and Learning with Technology (3 Credits)

Situates technology in the classroom within a larger social and cultural context. Along with exploring social opportunities afforded by technology, this course will cover important cultural and ethical dimensions of technology, including equity, inclusion, access, and questions of

privacy and digital citizenship (for both teachers and students). After completing this course, students will be prepared to bring technology into their classrooms in responsible and safe ways while being able

to take advantage of the new forms of interaction, instruction, and communication made possible through technology.
